scripts.build:demo: node scripts/write_demo_build_info.js && npm run check && jscpd src/ && npm run gen:types && node scripts/check_api_paths.js && tsc --noEmit && vite build --mode demo
scripts.build: npm run check && jscpd src/ && npm run gen:types && node scripts/check_api_paths.js && tsc --noEmit && vite build && node scripts/embed_frontend.js
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run i18n:check && npm run i18n:plugin:test
scripts.lint: oxlint src mock scripts vite.config.ts --ignore-pattern src/types.generated.ts
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --fix src mock scripts vite.config.ts --ignore-pattern src/types.generated.ts
scripts.fix: npm run format && npm run lint:fix
